title: fix(finance): enable unattended GCP billing queries
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The bean counters never sleep
gist.blurb: Fixed our internal GCP billing queries so they can run unattended without manual auth. The hive's accounting department is back to running smoothly.
gist.summary: Updated the internal finance scripts to use service account key authentication for GCP billing queries, allowing the daily cron job to run unattended.
gist.impact: Internal billing metrics will now update reliably without requiring manual re-authentication.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated finance/billing queries running unattended. The Bee mascot wearing an accountant visor looking at a glowing terminal printing receipts automatically.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny green accountant's visor, watching a retro terminal automatically print out a long paper receipt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
